allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; versions = json.load\(sys.stdin\); v3 = [v for v in versions if v.startswith\('3.'\)]; print\(v3[-5:]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; versions = json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable = [v for v in versions if v.startswith\('3.'\) and 'nightly' not in v and 'alpha' not in v and 'beta' not in v and 'rc' not in v]; print\(stable[-8:]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; p = json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps = {**p.get\('dependencies', {}\), **p.get\('devDependencies', {}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k in ['react-native-reanimated', 'react-native-gesture-handler', 'react-native-safe-area-context'] if k in deps]")
